notes: This directory is the authoritative staged golden ISA definition for v0.56.4.
v0.56.4 is the live canonical LinxISA profile for this repository.
v0.56.4 retains the expanded 16-entry-per-hand tile register file, dynamic tile capacity descriptors, and the canonical B.IOT/B.CATR/B.DATR block descriptor spellings.
Historical pre-v0.56 profile material is removed from active repository surfaces after this profile validates.
v0.56.4+ adds 32-bit CAS (CASB/CASH/CASW/CASD) with encoding 6..4=001, 3..1=101, supporting independent input/output registers and aq/rl memory ordering.
DMA instruction added at encoding 6..4=000, 3..1=101, 14..12=111 for direct memory access operations.
